india_trends.summary: Explaining the company’s stance, Sridhar Vembu said direct interaction among teams helps resolve challenges faster and improves the quality of solutions developed.

india_trends.title: IOC Q4 results: Cons PAT surges 78% YoY to Rs 14,458 crore, revenue rises 7%
india_trends.summary: Indian Oil Corporation announced a significant 78% jump in net profit for the March quarter. Revenue also saw a healthy increase. The company's board recommended a final dividend for shareholders. Despite global uncertainties, IOC's profitability remained strong. Financial metrics like debt-to-equit

india_trends.title: Warsh to be sworn in as Fed chair at White House on Friday, Fox Business reports
india_trends.summary: Kevin Warsh is set to take over as U.S. Federal Reserve chair following Senate approval, with his swearing-in scheduled at the White House. His leadership comes at a critical time as the Fed navigates persistent inflation and pressure over interest rate cuts, marking a shift from the Powell era.

india_trends.title: IOCL Q4 Results: Net profit soars 56% YoY to ₹11,377 crore; declares final dividend of ₹1.25 per share
india_trends.summary: Indian Oil Corporation's FY26 March quarter saw a slight revenue increase to ₹2.36 lakh crore and total income of ₹2.38 lakh crore. Profit before tax surged to ₹14,458 crore, with net profit rising 78% year-on-year to ₹14,458 crore.

india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Tuesday
india_trends.summary: Indian indices were subdued with Nifty up 0.03% and Sensex down 0.10%. High volatility (VIX at 19.63) and bearish momentum indicators suggest near-term weakness. Analysts expect Nifty to trade between 23,300–23,800, with resistance near 23,650 and key selling pressure visible.

india_trends.summary: India's vital handloom and handicraft sector, employing millions, grapples with low wages and limited market reach. india_trends.title: Sebi proposes easing call recording rules for research analysts dealing with institutional investors
india_trends.summary: SEBI proposes relaxing mandatory call recording requirements for research analysts when dealing with institutional investors to reduce compliance burdens. The proposal recognizes institutional clients as sophisticated entities.

india_trends.title: Rs 3 a litre fuel price hike cuts losses by 25 per cent; daily loss drops to Rs 750 crore
india_trends.summary: In a noteworthy shift, Indian oil corporations have curtailed daily losses by almost 25% thanks to a Rs 3 per litre increase in petrol and diesel prices. Nevertheless, ongoing global crude oil fluctuation and a depreciating rupee mean that fuel prices still linger below production costs. Currently,

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold rebounds $27/oz, silver gains $1/oz as bond yields stabilise
india_trends.summary: Precious metals recovered on 18 May as bond yields stabilised, with gold futures rising by $27 and silver futures by $1.08. Elevated tensions in the Middle East have kept crude oil prices high, while upcoming Federal Reserve meeting minutes may influence the direction of precious metals.

india_trends.title: Captain Polyplast starts production at new Ahmedmad facility
india_trends.summary: Captain Polyplast Limited has commenced operations at its new manufacturing plant near Ahmedabad, significantly boosting its micro-irrigation system production. This facility enables in-house manufacturing of crucial components, promising enhanced cost efficiencies and improved profitability. The co

india_trends.title: Market Trading Guide: Buy PB Fintech, GE Shipping on Tuesday for gains up to 12%
india_trends.summary: Nifty recovered but volatility persists, with resistance at 23,650. Analysts recommend buying PB Fintech (Policybazaar) at Rs 1,749 for an 8% upside and GE Shipping at Rs 1,700 for a 12% upside, citing strong technical breakouts and momentum.

india_trends.title: India should increase investment in R&D to 2 per cent of GDP: Niti Aayog
india_trends.summary: Niti Aayog has urged India to boost research and development investment to two percent of GDP within five years. The report suggests restoring a five percent GST slab for R&D procurement. It also calls for fiscal incentives to encourage private sector R&D spending. Strengthening CSR provisio

india_trends.title: RBI discontinues investment fluctuation reserve requirement for banks
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has discontinued the Investment Fluctuation Reserve for commercial banks. This change takes effect from May 18, 2026. Balances in the IFR will be transferred to other reserves. The Reserve Bank has issued separate circulars for cooperative banks, small finance banks, and pa

india_trends.title: IGL Q4 Results: Cons PAT falls 25% YoY to Rs 341 crore, revenue up 6%
india_trends.summary: Indraprastha Gas Limited (IGL) reported a Q4FY26 net profit fall of 25% YoY to Rs 341 crore, driven by an 8% growth in expenses. Despite the profit dip, revenue increased 6% to Rs 4,585 crore. The company board also recommended a final dividend of 75% for the financial year 2025-26.

india_trends.title: Royal Enfield plans to set up manufacturing facility in Andhra
india_trends.summary: Royal Enfield is investing Rs 2,500 crore to build a new manufacturing plant in Andhra Pradesh. This expansion will boost production capacity. The company already has significant operations in Tamil Nadu. This move is part of Royal Enfield's strategic growth plans. The new facility will create emplo

india_trends.title: NextEra Energy strikes $66.8 billion deal for Dominion in bets on AI power demand
india_trends.summary: The deal, one of the largest in the U.S. power industry, adds to a wave of consolidation as the rapid data-center buildout lifts power demand for the first time in two decades, opening up a lucrative revenue stream and boosting profit prospects.

india_trends.title: UnitedHealth falls after Berkshire sells stake in health insurer
india_trends.summary: UnitedHealth stock ​is up ​about 20% so far this year, after falling more than ⁠30% last year, which had made it the worst performer ​on the Dow Jones Industrial Average index in 2025.
